controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-2 Digital Day/Night Fan Speed Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-2 Digital Day/Night Fan Speed Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 120V AC induction motor inline fan
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can-Fan RK series, Hurricane Commercial Grade Inline Fan, Active Air AC inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Triac phase-cut provides variable speed 25–100% based on temperature setpoint; day/night setpoints configurable separately via built-in photocell. Connected fan must be 120V and must not exceed 4.5A continuous (6A fuse). EC motor fans (AC Infinity CLOUDLINE, Phresh HyperFan, Can-Fan Max) are NOT compatible — EC motors require 0–10V or PWM signal and can be damaged by phase-cut AC. Controller is 120V/60 Hz (US market); requires step-down transformer for 230V/50 Hz German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-2 Digital Day/Night Fan Speed Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hurricane clip fans (AC motor models), Active Air AC clip fans
compatible_devices.notes: Triac phase-cut speed control can work for AC motor circulation fans but small shaded-pole motors (common in cheap clip fans) can overheat or be damaged by phase-cut voltage at low speeds; verify fan compatibility before use. Max 4.5A. Controller is 120V only.
